source.name: 2026 CISO Survey: The State of Incident Response Readiness

methodology_notes: Survey of 600+ senior cybersecurity decision-makers, released April 2026. Grounds the operational mindset under pressure: most have the components of IR but lack confidence they can execute under real attack, due to organizational friction, cross-environment visibility gaps, and a broadening AI-era threat surface.

distributions.context: 73% say their organization would NOT be fully ready to execute under pressure if a significant attack occurred tomorrow.
76% of organizations experienced at least one cyber attack in the last 12 months.
99% have a formal IR plan in place — but foundational components are not delivering a unified response in practice.
